message.content:
THE 5★ PATH • PUBLIC PROOF ENGINE  

Every 5★ Becomes Public Proof — End to End  

01  
Redirect to Review  
Sent to your Google review link — or an internal form / private WhatsApp instead.  

02  
AI Auto-Response  
Once posted, AI replies on-brand — tailored to your business and the words of their review.  

03  
Instagram Story  
The review is auto-designed into a branded Story and published.  

04  
Post or Reel  
Also posted to Facebook & Instagram as a feed post — or a Reel if you choose.  

One 5★ rating turns into a public reply and 3 pieces of branded content — with zero manual design or copywriting.
